description.summary: Belief that Earth is a flat plane rather than a sphere or oblate spheroid. Despite overwhelming scientific evidence spanning millennia proving Earth's spherical shape, the belief experienced a modern resurgence through internet communities and YouTube algorithms.
description.full: The Flat Earth belief claims that Earth is a flat plane rather than the scientifically proven oblate spheroid. Modern Flat Earth believers typically claim NASA and governments hide the truth, space exploration is faked, and Antarctica forms an ice wall barrier. Various models exist including dome sky, infinite plane, and disc with edge. The belief contradicts millennia of evidence including ships disappearing hull-first over horizon, changing star positions, satellite technology, physics, photographs from space, and circumnavigation. Ancient Greeks knew Earth was spherical (Eratosthenes measured it in 240 BCE). The modern resurgence began in the 2000s through internet communities, particularly amplified by YouTube recommendation algorithms. Earth is demonstrably spherical with overwhelming evidence. The belief represents science denial and serves as a gateway to other conspiracy theories.

etymology.origin: Self-descriptive term for the belief that Earth is flat rather than spherical
etymology.meaning: Earth shaped as a flat plane

related_phenomena.name: Gateway Conspiracy Belief
related_phenomena.description: Flat Earth often leads to belief in other conspiracies

common_models.description: Flat disc with dome-shaped sky (firmament), sun/moon/stars rotate inside dome
common_models.antarctica: Ice wall forms edge, preventing water from flowing off
common_models.prevalence: Most common modern flat Earth model

common_models.description: Earth extends infinitely in all directions, known world is small section
common_models.antarctica: Ice wall marks boundary of known world, more land beyond

common_models.description: Finite disc with edge that can be reached
common_models.antarctica: Ice wall or barrier prevents reaching edge
common_models.prevalence: Rare in modern flat Earth belief

common_elements: Sun and moon are small and local (not millions of miles away)
Stars are lights in dome/firmament, not distant suns
Gravity doesn't exist or is replaced by 'density' or 'buoyancy'
Antarctica is ice wall barrier (guarded by government/NASA)
Space exploration is faked (NASA, other space agencies)
Globe Earth is conspiracy by governments/scientists/elites

alleged_evidence.description: Looking at ocean or flat land, horizon looks flat not curved
alleged_evidence.reality: Earth is too large for curvature to be obvious at ground level; curve visible from high altitude/aircraft

alleged_evidence.description: Water always finds level, can't stick to spinning ball
alleged_evidence.reality: Gravity pulls water toward Earth's center of mass, creating spherical ocean surface

alleged_evidence.description: Distant objects visible that should be hidden by curvature
alleged_evidence.reality: Atmospheric refraction can bend light, allowing visibility beyond geometric horizon

alleged_evidence.description: Planes don't adjust nose down to follow curve
alleged_evidence.reality: Planes fly at constant altitude above curved surface; gravity provides constant downward pull

alleged_evidence.description: If Earth orbits sun, star positions should change more
alleged_evidence.reality: Stellar parallax is measurable but small due to vast distances; has been measured since 1838

conspiracy_claims.reality: Photos explained by camera physics; independent space agencies worldwide
Treaty preserves continent for science; tourism and research expeditions occur regularly
Scientific consensus based on evidence; impossible to maintain worldwide conspiracy
No motive or mechanism for such deception; shape of Earth doesn't enable control

ancient_knowledge.description: Earth's spherical shape has been known for millennia

evidence.contribution: Proposed spherical Earth based on observations
Provided evidence: ships disappear hull-first, changing star positions, Earth's shadow on moon is round
Calculated Earth's circumference with remarkable accuracy using shadow angles

ancient_knowledge.note: Educated people have known Earth is spherical for over 2,000 years

modern_evidence.description: Ships disappear over horizon bottom-first, proving curvature
modern_evidence.observation: Visible to anyone near large body of water
modern_evidence.debunks_flat_earth: On flat plane, entire ship would remain visible shrinking into distance

modern_evidence.description: Different stars visible from different latitudes; southern/northern hemispheres see different stars
modern_evidence.observation: Documented for millennia; observable to anyone traveling north-south
modern_evidence.debunks_flat_earth: Only possible on sphere; flat plane would show same stars from all positions

modern_evidence.description: Different local times across globe due to Earth's rotation
modern_evidence.observation: Sunset/sunrise occurs at different times; provable with phone calls/internet
modern_evidence.debunks_flat_earth: Flat Earth models can't explain simultaneous day/night across world

modern_evidence.description: Traveling continuously east or west returns to starting point
modern_evidence.observation: Accomplished countless times by sea and air
modern_evidence.debunks_flat_earth: Impossible on flat plane with edge

modern_evidence.description: GPS, communications, weather satellites function based on spherical Earth orbits
modern_evidence.observation: Billions use GPS daily; satellite TV works worldwide
modern_evidence.debunks_flat_earth: System only functions with spherical Earth and orbital mechanics

modern_evidence.description: Thousands of photos from multiple space agencies, private companies, astronauts
modern_evidence.observation: NASA, ESA, Roscosmos, CNSA, SpaceX, etc. all show spherical Earth
modern_evidence.debunks_flat_earth: Independent agencies from competing nations all show same spherical Earth

modern_evidence.description: Gravity pulls objects toward center of mass, creating sphere
modern_evidence.observation: All large celestial bodies are spherical due to gravity
modern_evidence.debunks_flat_earth: Flat Earth violates fundamental physics; no mechanism for flat shape under gravity

modern_evidence.description: Earth's shadow on moon is always circular, proving spherical shape
modern_evidence.debunks_flat_earth: Only sphere casts circular shadow from all angles

modern_evidence.description: Rotation causes deflection of moving objects; affects weather, ballistics
modern_evidence.observation: Hurricanes rotate differently in hemispheres; measurable in physics
modern_evidence.debunks_flat_earth: Effect only occurs on rotating sphere

scientific_evidence.scientific_consensus: Earth is an oblate spheroid (slightly flattened sphere). This is scientific fact proven by overwhelming evidence from multiple independent fields: astronomy, physics, geology, navigation, space exploration.

historical_belief.note: Contrary to popular myth, educated people have NOT believed in flat Earth for millennia
historical_belief.reality: Medieval scholars knew Earth was spherical; 'flat Earth' medieval belief is modern myth
historical_belief.flat_earth_societies: Modern flat Earth belief is fringe phenomenon, not continuation of historical consensus

modern_resurgence.event: Samuel Shenton founds Flat Earth Society (UK)
modern_resurgence.significance: Modern organized flat Earth movement begins

modern_resurgence.event: Charles K. Johnson leads Flat Earth Society (USA)

modern_resurgence.significance: Online forums and websites allow believers to connect
modern_resurgence.context: Still fringe but growing through internet

modern_resurgence.significance: Flat Earth videos recommended to viewers, explosive growth

modern_resurgence.context: Mix of true believers and trolls; cultural phenomenon

youtube_radicalization.description: YouTube's recommendation algorithm heavily promoted flat Earth videos in mid-2010s
youtube_radicalization.mechanism: Users watching conspiracy content recommended increasingly extreme videos
youtube_radicalization.impact: Rapid growth in flat Earth belief; many believers cite YouTube as introduction
youtube_radicalization.response: YouTube later adjusted algorithm to reduce conspiracy theory promotion

cognitive_factors.description: Belief provides identity as someone who 'knows truth' others don't
Deep skepticism toward science, government, authority
cognitive_factors.relevance: Rejection of scientific consensus as conspiracy

cognitive_factors.description: Flat Earth community provides social connection and acceptance
Earth 'feels' stationary and flat from ground level
cognitive_factors.relevance: Trusting personal experience over abstract science

cognitive_factors.description: Some interpret biblical passages as describing flat Earth

social_factors: Entertainment and trolling mixed with genuine belief

dangers.science_denial: Flat Earth represents fundamental rejection of scientific method and evidence
dangers.gateway_belief: Often leads to belief in other conspiracy theories (QAnon, anti-vaccine, etc.)
dangers.educational_harm: Children exposed to flat Earth misinformation
dangers.social_division: Creates conflict with family/friends over provably false belief

simple_proofs: Watch ship disappear hull-first over ocean horizon
Call someone in different time zone during your daytime - confirm it's nighttime there
Observe different stars from different latitudes
Use GPS (requires satellites in spherical Earth orbit)
Watch lunar eclipse - Earth's shadow on moon is circular
Book circumnavigation flight, observe continuous eastward/westward travel

experiments.name: Bedford Level experiment
experiments.reality: Proved spherical Earth when conducted properly; flat Earthers use debunked version

experiments.name: Laser tests
experiments.reality: Refraction affects results; proper tests show curvature

experiments.name: Behind the Curve documentary
experiments.result: Flat Earthers' own experiments prove spherical Earth, but they reject results

debunking.logical_impossibility: Flat Earth models cannot explain: time zones, seasons, star positions, satellite technology, circumnavigation, physics. Every explanation requires ad-hoc special pleading.

sources.title: Flat Earth: The History of an Infamous Idea
Eratosthenes' Measurement of Earth's Circumference
sources.description: Ancient calculation of Earth's size proving spherical shape
